name: @switchyard/local-llm-gateway
description: Local-first gateway for running and routing open model backends through OpenAI and Anthropic-compatible APIs.

scripts.check: node --check bin/switchyard.mjs && node --check src/backend-catalog.mjs && node --check src/benchmarks.mjs && node --check src/bootstrap.mjs && node --check src/client-integrations.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/init.mjs && node --check src/installer.mjs && node --check src/machine-profile.mjs && node --check src/recipe-index.mjs && node --check src/recipe-pack.mjs && node --check src/registry.mjs && node --check src/recipes.mjs && node --check src/runtime-manager.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/setup.mjs && node --check src/setup-status.mjs && node --check src/process-control.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-client-configs.mjs && node --check test/smoke.mjs
